script:
set -e; CATID=28d694aa-a808-4169-8277-b11d6e6eff70; echo '===== Upload v1.2 as new appDefinition ====='; TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); RESP=$(curl -sS -w "
__HTTP__:%{http_code}" -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CATID/appDefinitions?requiresReview=false" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/zip" --data-binary @/home/azureuser/rosi-teams-app/rosi-teams-app-v1.2.zip); CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "  http_code=$CODE"; echo "$RESP" | grep -v '__HTTP__' | jq '{teamsAppId, version, displayName, publishingState}' 2>&1 | head -10; if [ "$CODE" = "201" ] || [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then echo; echo '===== Set systemd env var + restart ====='; for svc in rosi-bot rosi-responder; do sudo mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d; printf '[Service]
Environment="ROSI_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID=%s"
' "$CATID" | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d/catalog-id.conf >/dev/null; done; sudo systemctl daemon-reload; sudo systemctl restart rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; sleep 2; systemctl is-active rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; echo; echo 'env after restart:'; systemctl show rosi-responder.service -p Environment --value; else echo 'upload failed'; fi
